title: athyrium longius
intro: Athyrium longius, also known as the Himalayan Lady Fern, is a species of fern native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Athyrium longius include its ability to reduce blood pressure, improve respiratory health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or by using the plant in a decoction to extract its medicinal compounds.
